publishedAbstract: - How to scale Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) for noobaa-endpoint? ~~~ # oc get hpa oc get hpa NAME REFERENCE TARGETS MINPODS MAXPODS REPLICAS AGE noobaa-endpoint Deployment/noobaa-endpoint 0%/80% 1 2 1 2d20h ~~~
publishedTitle: How to scale Horizontal Pod Autoscaler for noobaa-endpoint ?
